description: Base item master table for Oracle Inventory. Each record represents an inventory item definition within an organization and controls planning, purchasing, costing, shipping, receiving, service, and inventory behavior used across supply chain processes.

columns.name: INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
columns.description: Unique system-generated identifier for the inventory item. Used together with organization context to relate item setup, translated descriptions, costs, and transaction history.

columns.name: ORGANIZATION_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the inventory organization or operating organization that owns the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was last updated.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that last updated the record.

columns.name: CREATION_DATE
columns.description: Date and time when the record was created.

columns.name: CREATED_BY
columns.description: User identifier for the person or process that created the record.

columns.name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.description: Login session identifier that performed the last update.

columns.name: SUMMARY_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether summary applies to the record.

columns.name: ENABLED_FLAG
columns.description: Indicates whether enabled applies to the record.

columns.name: START_DATE_ACTIVE
columns.description: Business attribute of the inventory item used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: END_DATE_ACTIVE
columns.description: Business attribute of the inventory item used for Oracle EBS transaction processing, control, or reporting.

columns.name: DESCRIPTION
columns.description: Free-text business description entered to explain the purpose or content of the transaction.

columns.name: BUYER_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the buyer responsible for the item or purchasing relationship.

columns.name: ACCOUNTING_RULE_ID
columns.description: Foreign key referencing the accounting rule that controls revenue recognition timing.

columns.name: INVOICING_RULE_ID
columns.description: System-generated identifier for the related invoicing rule record.

columns.name: SEGMENT1
columns.description: Primary item number segment used as the core business item identifier.

columns.description: Additional item key flexfield segment 2 used to build the full item number or item classification.

business_questions: Show item master setup for an inventory organization.
Find items enabled for purchasing, inventory, and customer orders.
Display planning, costing, and receiving controls for an item.
Show item attributes used in shipping and inventory transactions.
Find items by item number, description, or category segment.
Identify items that are inactive or end-dated.
Show items with serial, lot, or locator control enabled.
Display item master records used in costing and transaction history.
